name: Potato Salad Supreme (Vrg)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Broccoli florets, steamed and cooled
Favorite salad dressing (Nonfat or low-oil works best)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl, reserving the olives for garnish.
2. Serve at room temperature for best flavor.
